name: Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salad oil, eggs, and milk.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the oil, egg, and milk mixture; mix well.
4. Pour the batter into a greased pan.
5. Sprinkle the spicy topping over the batter.
6. Bake at 375 Degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes, rotating the pan after 10 minutes.
